justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic update fix proposed (SELECT FOR UPDATE / atomic UPDATE WHERE stock >= $qty), TOCTOU pattern explicitly named, safe_to_deploy is false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as a separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named in title and summary; clear explanation of the read-check-write gap
Atomic fix is specific: both SELECT FOR UPDATE and atomic UPDATE...WHERE stock >= $qty with row count check
Partial failure between addItem and decrementStock called out as separate Critical finding with transaction rollback fix
Excellent reproduction steps for the race condition with concrete stock values
Bonus: caught negative quantity input validation vulnerability — not required but adds value
Confidence level 97 with well-reasoned high/low confidence areas and explicit assumptions

observations.text: TOCTOU explicitly named in finding title and confidence areas
Atomic fix is specific: UPDATE...WHERE stock >= $qty RETURNING affected rows
